mapper.select: select m.messageId, m.fromId, u.username as fromName, m.groupId, m.content, m.imageUrl, m.postTime, m.isRevoked from group_message m, user u where m.groupId = #{groupId} and m.fromId = u.userId order by m.postTime asc limit 100
mapper.insert: insert into group_message (fromId, groupId, content, imageUrl, postTime, isRevoked) values (#{fromId}, #{groupId}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, now(), 0)
mapper.update: update group_message set isRevoked = 1 where messageId = #{messageId}
